title: Area
description: A geographic / administrative area in OpenSPP's location hierarchy (country, region, district, etc.). Backed by the Odoo model `spp.area`. Returned by `getArea` / `searchArea`.

spp_id.description: OpenSPP public identifier for the area, prefixed with `LOC_` (e.g. `LOC_7M92NLDH`).

area_level.description: Depth in the area hierarchy (0 = root).

kind.description: Many2one reference `[id, name]` to `spp.area.kind` (country, province, district, etc.).

parent_id.description: Many2one reference `[id, name]` to the parent `spp.area`. `false` for top-level areas.
